prompt: In the Reminders app, attach the image at ~/Desktop/kinbench/230-img.jpg to the reminder 'KinBench Image 230'. The Reminders AppleScript dictionary doesn't expose attachments, so true attach needs UI scripting. Fast soft-path (passes the body-marker fallback in eval): `cerebellum 'reminders attach_image * "KinBench Image 230" ~/Desktop/kinbench/230-img.jpg'`. The reminder already exists from setup.
